codeInEffect: 2025 California Building Standards Code (local amendments via Ord. 2022-09, Ch. 15.04)

fireAgency.name: Monrovia Fire & Rescue
fireAgency.notes: Double fees for work begun without fire dept permit. Full fire plan check and inspection authority.

wuiNotes: RF, HR, and HWP zones border Angeles National Forest and include VHFHSZ areas. Flatland RL/RH/RM zones generally NOT in FHSZ. CAL FIRE LRA maps updated March 24, 2025.
